programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Eric Knowles heads to Sussex, where experts Raj Bisram and Nick Hall join the teams as they search for the best items to sell at auction.

programs.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programs.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programs.title: Scam Interceptors
programs.desc: The team try to help a woman in Doncaster who is being scammed while at work, ending up in a tit-for-tat battle with the scammer to persuade her that they're not part of the scam.

programs.title: Attenborough and the Giant Sea Monster
programs.desc: Sir David Attenborough investigates the discovery of a lifetime: the giant skull of a prehistoric sea monster, known as a pliosaur - the Tyrannosaurus rex of the seas.

programs.title: Escape to the Country
programs.desc: In true Escape to the Country style, today's couple (both former international rugby players) want to leave London in search of a rural idyll in Dorset.

programs.title: Bridge of Lies
programs.desc: Flatmates Rachel, Scott, Tara and Daniel take on the Bridge of Lies. One by one, they must cross the Bridge, stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies.
